title: Watch Configuration Schema
description: Configuration file for the filewatcher tool.

$schema.description: Path or URL to the JSON schema.

debounceMs.description: Delay in milliseconds before triggering an action after a file change.

logLevel.description: Controls debug output visibility. Set to 'Debug' or 'Trace' to enable verbose diagnostic logging. Defaults to 'Info'.

dashboardPort.description: TCP port for the web dashboard.

onStartup.description: Commands to run once when the application starts or after a config reload.

onUpdate.description: Entries that watch a source file and act on changes.

startupEntry.description: A command to execute on startup.

location.description: Working directory for the command. Defaults to the current directory.

logLevel.description: Log level for this entry's hook output. Set to 'None' to suppress all output.

updateEntry.description: Watches a source file; optionally copies it and/or runs a command on change.

source.description: Absolute or relative path to the source file to watch.

enabled.description: When false, this entry is skipped entirely.

copyTo.description: Destination path to copy the source file to on change. Omit to skip copying.

command.description: Shell command to run after a change (and after copying, if applicable). Omit to skip.

location.description: Working directory for the command. Defaults to the current directory.

description.description: Human-readable description shown in summaries and warnings.

logLevel.description: Log level for this entry's hook output. Set to 'None' to suppress all output.
